title: elaphoglossum ceylanicum
intro: Elaphoglossum ceylanicum, also known as Ceylonan fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum ceylanicum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically used in infusions or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
